use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF AUTOSOMAL DOMINANT POLYCYSTIC KIDNEY DISEASE

indications.text:
JYNARQUEis indicated to slow kidney function decline in adults at risk ofrapidly progressing autosomal
dominant polycystic kidney disease(ADPKD).

JYNARQUE is indicated to slow kidney function decline in adults at risk of rapidly progressing autosomal
dominant polycystic kidney disease (ADPKD).
